scripts.build: bun run build:types && bun run build:sdk
scripts.build:drivers: bun run --filter @tagma/driver-codex build && bun run --filter @tagma/driver-opencode build
scripts.build:all: bun run build:types && bun run build:sdk && bun run build:drivers
scripts.check: bun run check:types && bun run check:sdk && bun run check:server
scripts.publish:types: cd packages/types && bun run build && npm publish
scripts.publish:driver-codex: cd packages/driver-codex && bun run build && npm publish
scripts.publish:driver-opencode: cd packages/driver-opencode && bun run build && npm publish
scripts.publish:sdk: cd packages/sdk && bun run build && npm publish
scripts.publish:all: bun run publish:types && bun run publish:driver-codex && bun run publish:driver-opencode && bun run publish:sdk
scripts.publish:dry: cd packages/types && npm publish --dry-run && cd ../driver-codex && npm publish --dry-run && cd ../driver-opencode && npm publish --dry-run && cd ../sdk && npm publish --dry-run
